## SourceId type

Unique identifier for a source (collection of ingredients/recipes) Character restrictions: alphanumeric, dashes, underscores only (no dots) Pattern: /^\[a-zA-Z0-9\_-\]+$/

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type SourceId = Brand<string, 'SourceId'>;
```
